title: Calculate position size and save entry to journal from calculator
description: Verifies a valid position calculation can be saved to the journal and is visible in the journal list.

steps.description: Navigate to "/"
Type "BTC/USDT" into the Asset Pair field
Type "10000" into the Capital field
Type "1" into the Risk Percentage field
Type "100" into the Entry Price field
Type "90" into the Stop Loss Price field
Click "Save to Journal" button
Verify text "Position Size" is visible

title: Saved calculation appears in journal page list
description: Verifies that after saving from the calculator, the entry is visible on the journal page in the same session.

steps.description: Navigate to "/"
Type "ETH/USDT" into the Asset Pair field
Type "5000" into the Capital field
Type "2" into the Risk Percentage field
Type "200" into the Entry Price field
Type "180" into the Stop Loss Price field
Click "Save to Journal" button
Click on "Journal" navigation link
Verify URL contains "/journal"
Verify text "ETH/USDT" is visible

title: Asset Pair is optional and save still works
description: Verifies that leaving Asset Pair blank still allows calculation and saving to the journal.

steps.description: Navigate to "/"
Type "2500" into the Capital field
Type "0.5" into the Risk Percentage field
Type "50" into the Entry Price field
Type "45" into the Stop Loss Price field
Click "Save to Journal" button
Verify text "Position Size" is visible

title: Mark an existing journal entry as Won
description: Verifies a journal entry can be updated to Won and the updated status is visible in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Verify element "Journal entries list" is visible
Verify element "A journal entry row" is visible
Click on the "Won" button for a journal entry
Verify text "Won" is visible within that journal entry

title: Mark an existing journal entry as Lost
description: Verifies a journal entry can be updated to Lost and the updated status is visible in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Verify element "Journal entries list" is visible
Verify element "A journal entry row" is visible
Click on the "Lost" button for a journal entry
Verify text "Lost" is visible within that journal entry

title: Delete a single journal entry from the list
description: Verifies a single journal entry can be removed from the visible list via Delete on that entry.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Verify element "A journal entry row" is visible
Verify element "Delete" button on a journal entry is visible
Click on the "Delete" button for a journal entry
Verify text "No entries" is visible or the deleted entry is no longer visible in the list

title: Delete all journal entries using Delete All
description: Verifies the Delete All control clears the journal list in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Verify element "Delete all" button is visible
Click on the "Delete all" button
Verify text "No entries" is visible
Verify element "Journal entries list" is not visible

title: Delete All on an already-empty journal
description: Verifies Delete All is safe/idempotent when there are no entries and the UI remains in an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Click on the "Delete all" button
Verify text "No entries" is visible
Verify element "A journal entry row" is not visible

title: Mark Won on an entry already marked Won
description: Verifies clicking Won again does not break the UI and the entry remains marked as Won.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Verify element "A journal entry row" is visible
Click on the "Won" button for a journal entry
Verify text "Won" is visible within that journal entry
Click on the "Won" button for the same journal entry
Verify text "Won" is visible within that journal entry

title: Toggle status from Won to Lost for the same entry
description: Verifies a user can change an entry status from Won to Lost and the latest status is reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Verify element "A journal entry row" is visible
Click on the "Won" button for a journal entry
Verify text "Won" is visible within that journal entry
Click on the "Lost" button for the same journal entry
Verify text "Lost" is visible within that journal entry

title: Evaluate journal successfully shows AI feedback
description: Verifies that evaluating a non-empty journal runs analysis and displays an AI feedback message.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Verify element "Evaluate My Journal" is visible
Click "Evaluate My Journal" button
Verify text "Analyzing Discipline..." is visible
Verify element "AI feedback" is visible
Verify text "AI evaluation failed" is not visible

title: Double-click prevention: button stays in analyzing state after first click
description: Verifies that repeated clicking does not interrupt the analyzing state once evaluation has started.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Verify element "Evaluate My Journal" is visible
Click "Evaluate My Journal" button
Verify text "Analyzing Discipline..." is visible
Click "Evaluating" button showing text "Analyzing Discipline..."
Verify text "Analyzing Discipline..." is visible

title: AI feedback remains visible after scrolling the journal page
description: Verifies that once AI feedback is displayed, it remains visible during normal page interaction.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Click "Evaluate My Journal" button
Verify element "AI feedback" is visible
Scroll to the bottom of the page
Verify element "AI feedback" is visible
